product.name: Codex Switchboard
product.tagline: The multi-account workspace layer for Codex
product.summary: A commercial path for turning Codex Switchboard from a useful wrapper into a reliable product for freelancers, agencies, and teams.

northStar.title: North Star
northStar.goal: Make multi-account Codex usage feel native, safe, and team-ready without breaking local history or project context.
northStar.successMetric: Weekly active users who switch accounts at least 3 times per week and keep Codex Switchboard installed for 30+ days.

positioning.title: For freelancers
positioning.description: Switch between personal, client, and work identities without losing project continuity.

positioning.title: For agencies
positioning.description: Assign Codex identities by client and keep context, policies, and access organized.

positioning.title: For teams
positioning.description: Centralize profile management, onboarding, and account controls across multiple developers.

phases.name: Stabilize The Core
phases.outcome: Turn the current utility into a reliable product foundation.
items: Safer backup model across pnpm, npm, Homebrew, and Windows shims
Telemetry hooks for anonymous install and command usage
Better error states and recovery guidance

phases.name: Define The Paid Value
phases.outcome: Move beyond account switching into workflow management.
items: Project rules for preferred account and startup behavior
Account notes, labels, and environment hints
Desktop-grade onboarding and polished first-run flow

phases.name: Commercial MVP
phases.outcome: Ship a version people can pay for.
items: Cloud sync for profiles and project mappings

channels: Product Hunt or similar dev tool launch
Direct outreach to freelancers and agencies using multiple AI coding accounts
Demo videos showing personal vs client account workflows
proofPoints: Works in the same folder and same machine context
One-line install across macOS, Linux, and Windows
Fast account switching without re-setup friction

metrics.name: Activation
metrics.target: 70% of installs complete first successful profile save

metrics.name: Conversion
metrics.target: 5-10% free to paid once sync and project presets exist

risks.title: Feature, not company
risks.mitigation: Sell workflow management, sync, and team controls instead of only auth switching.

risks.title: CLI changes upstream
risks.mitigation: Invest in compatibility tests and fallback install strategies.

risks.title: Security trust barrier
risks.mitigation: Document exactly what is stored, encrypt cloud sync, and provide local-only mode.

risks.title: Easy to copy
risks.mitigation: Win on reliability, UX, onboarding, and team workflows.

executionChecklist: Write positioning copy for Free / Pro / Team
Design team-mode schema before coding sync
